metadata.description: Cross-platform artist ID mapping for Dore Studio AI artists — Spotify / Apple Music / YouTube / Amazon Music

sources.spotify_roster: vault/analytics/spotify_artists.json (9 artists from Spotify for Artists)
sources.apple_music_roster: vault/analytics/apple_music_artists.json (10 artists from Apple Music for Artists)

notes.spotify_ids: Spotify artist IDs can be found at https://artists.spotify.com/c/roster — click artist → copy URI from address bar
notes.apple_music_ids: Apple Music artist IDs can be found at https://artists.apple.com/ui/measure — click artist → ID in URL
notes.youtube_ids: YouTube channel IDs available via YouTube Studio or auto-generated Topic channels
notes.amazon_asin: Amazon artist ASINs visible in URL at https://music.amazon.com/artists/{ASIN}/...
notes.missing_ids: Artists marked with null need manual lookup via respective artist dashboards (DistroKid login required for ISRCs too)

slavic-noir.name: Slavıc Noir
slavic-noir.genre: Russian Rap / Trap / Dark Mafia Music

valhaven.name: Valhaven
valhaven.genre: Viking Metal / Norse Folk / Dark Fantasy
valhaven.notes: Spotify & Apple Music IDs need manual lookup via dashboards. Latest release: Ragnarök Skal Ekki Deyja (2026-06-11). DistroKid: distrokid.com/hyperfollow/valhaven

baglamaci-lab.name: Bağlamacı Lab
baglamaci-lab.notes: Spotify & Apple Music IDs need manual lookup. Latest release: Türkü Bebesi Vol 1 (2026-04-23). DistroKid: distrokid.com/hyperfollow/baglamaclab

dark-blues-music-lab.name: Dark Blues Music Lab
dark-blues-music-lab.genre: Dark Blues / Whiskey Blues / Delta Blues
dark-blues-music-lab.notes: Spotify ID not in roster — may not have Spotify presence yet. Apple Music & Amazon IDs need manual lookup.

dark-ambient-abyss.name: Dark Ambient Abyss
dark-ambient-abyss.notes: YouTube Topic channel has 33 videos. Spotify & Apple Music IDs need manual lookup via dashboards.

azultvkids.name: Azultvkids
azultvkids.notes: Latest release: Toddler Routine Champions, Vol. 2 (2026-05-06). Has official website at azultvkids.com

the-kh4n.name: THE KH4N
the-kh4n.genre: Turkish Rap / Trap / Dark Mafia Music
the-kh4n.notes: All platform IDs need manual lookup. DistroKid: distrokid.com/hyperfollow/thekh4n. Latest: KÖK SÜZ, Kara yemin, Boş konuşma

silk-nomad-lofi.name: Silk Nomad Lofi
silk-nomad-lofi.notes: All platform IDs need manual lookup. Only appears in Spotify roster. Low web presence — likely very recent or minimal releases.

sezen.name: Sezen
sezen.notes: All platform IDs need manual lookup. Only appears in Apple Music roster. Hard to search due to name collision with famous Turkish singer Sezen Aksu.

durock.name: DurocK
durock.notes: All platform IDs need manual lookup. Only appears in Apple Music roster.

bay-beat.name: Bay Beat
bay-beat.notes: All platform IDs need manual lookup. Only appears in Apple Music roster. Very low web presence.

roster_summary.note: Task specifies 14 artists but combined roster yields 13 unique. The 14th may be artist_01 (test), a recent addition not yet in rosters, or a miscount.

next_steps: Log into Spotify for Artists (https://artists.spotify.com/c/roster) to copy artist URIs for artists marked 'needs_lookup' or 'partial'
Log into Apple Music for Artists (https://artists.apple.com/ui/measure) to copy artist IDs
Log into DistroKid (https://distrokid.com/mymusic/) for ISRC codes and YouTube Content ID links
Search YouTube for each artist's auto-generated 'Topic' channel for YouTube channel IDs
Search Amazon Music (https://music.amazon.com) for remaining artist ASINs
Confirm the 14th artist identity — possibly artist_01 (test) or a recent roster addition
